title: United Airlines Holdings 2025 Annual Report
note: Fiscal 2025 Form 10-K source for network structure, hubs, regional operations, MileagePlus, distribution channels, revenue, fuel exposure, and profitability.

title: United Airlines Holdings Q1 2026 Form 10-Q
note: Quarterly filing used to confirm current 2026 revenue, net income, shares outstanding, and balance-sheet context.

title: United Airlines Holdings Investor Relations Profile
note: Investor profile source for company scale, destination count, customer count, daily departures, and MileagePlus membership framing.

title: CompaniesMarketCap United Airlines Holdings Market Capitalization
note: Market-data source for United Airlines Holdings current market capitalization and public-company market ranking context.

title: CompaniesMarketCap United Airlines Holdings P/E Ratio
note: Market-data source for United Airlines Holdings trailing price-to-earnings ratio.

title: IATA New Distribution Capability
note: Technical source for NDC as an airline distribution standard available to third parties, intermediaries, and IT providers.

title: OpenFlights Airport, Airline and Route Data
note: Open aviation data source for airport, airline, aircraft, and historical route datasets under open database licensing.

title: LetsFG GitHub Repository
note: Open-source flight-search project relevant to transparent airline price discovery and agent-oriented travel search.

title: Open Loyalty Loyalty Blockchain
note: Apache-licensed Hyperledger Fabric loyalty-ledger project relevant to portable or federated loyalty infrastructure.
